examples: The polaron ground state in asymmetric double heterostructure (ADHS) is studied.
Heterostructure is the most essential and important structure of semiconductor lasers.
The resonant tunneling diode (RTD) is one of the most promising band-gap engineered heterostructure devices due to its negative differential resistance.
The different characteristics of the semiconductors in the heterostructure mean that electrons get trapped in the middle of the sandwich.
